SEARCH
Package client.service

Class NetworkService

java.lang.Object
client.service.NetworkService
public class NetworkService extends Object
Thin async wrapper around ClientConnection. Every call is dispatched on a background thread and the resulting CompletableFuture is always resolved on the JavaFX Application thread, so callers can update UI state directly inside thenAccept(...). Every completed call notifies any registered ConnectionListener so the sidebar pill can reflect the current socket state.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    NetworkService.ConnectionListener
    Notified after every completed call so the UI can reflect socket reachability.
    static final class 
    NetworkService.ProbeResult
    Result bundle for probe(String, int).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    acceptGrab(int reservationId)
    Accepts an active grab offer, confirming the WAITING reservation (the server re-validates the offer window and capacity).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    ackNotification(int notificationId)
    Acknowledges (marks read) a single notification, clearing its unread state.
    void
    addConnectionListener(NetworkService.ConnectionListener l)
    Registers a listener notified of connection-state changes.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    approveParamChange(int requestId)
    Approves a pending change (DEPT_MANAGER only); on success the new value is written to the park.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    cancellationsReport(String from, String to, Integer parkId)
    Runs the Cancellations report (DEPT_MANAGER only — the server re-checks the role).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    cancelReservation(int reservationId)
    Cancels a PENDING/CONFIRMED/WAITING reservation (server enforces the legal transition).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    casualVisit(int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long visitorId)
    Records a casual walk-in at the employee's park (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    confirmReservation(int reservationId)
    Confirms a PENDING reservation (server enforces the legal transition).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    createReservation(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
    Creates a reservation.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    currentOccupancy()
    Fetches live occupancy for the employee's own park (PARK_EMPLOYEE only — no park id is sent, so the server derives it from the session).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    enterVisit(int confirmationCode, long visitorId)
    Admits a visitor against a CONFIRMED reservation (PARK_EMPLOYEE only — the server re-checks the role and that the gate operates the employee's own park).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    exitVisit(Integer confirmationCode, Long visitorId)
    Records a visitor's exit, closing their open visit (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    exitVisitByTicket(int visitId)
    Records a casual walk-in's exit by its ticket number (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    getMyPark()
    Fetches the logged-in park manager's own park — no id is sent, so the server derives it from the session.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    joinWaitlist(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
    Joins the waiting list for a full park/date — same inputs as a booking.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    leaveWaitlist(int reservationId)
    Leaves the waiting list for a WAITING reservation.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    listNotifications()
    Lists the logged-in actor's notifications, newest first (the offline-fetch path for the notification center).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    listParks()
    Lists every park, for the booking dropdown.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    listPendingChanges()
    Lists all PENDING parameter-change requests (DEPT_MANAGER only).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    listReservations(long visitorId)
    Lists every reservation owned by a visitor.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    listWaitlist(long visitorId)
    Lists a visitor's active waiting-list entries (queue position + any live grab offer).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    loginStaff(String username, String password)
    Authenticates a staff user.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    loginVisitor(long visitorId)
    Authenticates a visitor by national ID.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    logout()
    Logs the current actor out, releasing the server-side single-login lock.

    probe(String host, int port)
    Probe a host:port pair by opening a fresh socket and sending a PING.

    registerGuide(long visitorId, String fullName, String phone, String email)
    Registers a visitor as a group guide (SERVICE_REP only — the server re-checks the role and stamps the guide row with the logged-in rep's id).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    registerSubscriber(long visitorId, String fullName, String phone, String email, int familySize)
    Registers a subscriber (SERVICE_REP only — the server re-checks the role).

    Rejects a pending change (DEPT_MANAGER only); the park is left unchanged.

  • Field Details

    • session

      private final Session session
      The client session whose connection requests are sent over.

    • listeners

      private final List<NetworkService.ConnectionListener> listeners
      Registered connection-state listeners, notified after each call.

  • Constructor Details

    • NetworkService

      public NetworkService(Session session)
      Creates a network service bound to a client session.
      Parameters:
      session - the session whose connection requests are sent over

  • Method Details

    • addConnectionListener

      public void addConnectionListener(NetworkService.ConnectionListener l)
      Registers a listener notified of connection-state changes.
      Parameters:
      l - the listener to add

    • probe

      public CompletableFuture<NetworkService.ProbeResult> probe(String host, int port)
      Probe a host:port pair by opening a fresh socket and sending a PING. Returned future resolves with the opened ClientConnection on success (caller is responsible for promoting it into the Session) or null on failure with a message in the accompanying ServerResponse.
      Parameters:
      host - the host name or IP to probe
      port - the TCP port to probe
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the probe outcome

    • send

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> send(ClientRequest req)
      Send a request using the active Session connection, asynchronously.
      Parameters:
      req - the request to send
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response (an error ServerResponse if not connected or the send fails)

    • createReservation

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> createReservation(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
      Creates a reservation. visitTime may be null (no preferred time). The VisitType is sent as the enum itself — it lives in common.dto and is Serializable, so the server reads it back directly without string parsing.
      Parameters:
      parkId - target park id
      visitorId - national-ID-style visitor id
      visitDate - visit date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      visitTime - visit time HH:mm:ss, or null
      partySize - number of people in the party
      visitType - INDIVIDUAL, FAMILY, or GROUP
      guideId - registered guide's id for GROUP visits, or null otherwise
      paidInAdvance - whether the visitor opts to pay up front (deepens the group discount)
      email - the visitor's contact email (required; the booking's notification target)
      phone - the visitor's contact phone (required)
      Returns:
      future resolving (on the FX thread) with the server's response

    • listReservations

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> listReservations(long visitorId)
      Lists every reservation owned by a visitor.
      Parameters:
      visitorId - the owning visitor's national id
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • confirmReservation

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> confirmReservation(int reservationId)
      Confirms a PENDING reservation (server enforces the legal transition).
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the reservation to confirm
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • cancelReservation

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> cancelReservation(int reservationId)
      Cancels a PENDING/CONFIRMED/WAITING reservation (server enforces the legal transition).
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the reservation to cancel
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • updateReservation

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> updateReservation(int reservationId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize)
      Reschedules a PENDING/CONFIRMED reservation (date / optional time / party size). The server re-checks the status, the group cap and capacity, then recomputes the price. On success the response getData() is a ReservationUpdateResultDTO carrying the updated ReservationDTO plus the old and new price so the caller can settle the difference.
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the reservation to reschedule
      visitDate - the new visit date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      visitTime - the new visit time HH:mm:ss, or null
      partySize - the new party size
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • joinWaitlist

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> joinWaitlist(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
      Joins the waiting list for a full park/date — same inputs as a booking. The server creates a WAITING reservation (no capacity gate) plus its queue entry and prices it server-side. Response getData() is the created WaitlistEntryDTO.
      Parameters:
      parkId - target park id
      visitorId - national-ID-style visitor id
      visitDate - visit date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      visitTime - visit time HH:mm:ss, or null
      partySize - number of people in the party
      visitType - INDIVIDUAL, FAMILY, or GROUP
      guideId - registered guide's id for GROUP visits, or null otherwise
      paidInAdvance - whether the visitor opts to pay up front
      email - the visitor's contact email (required; target for the grab-offer notification)
      phone - the visitor's contact phone (required)
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • listWaitlist

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> listWaitlist(long visitorId)
      Lists a visitor's active waiting-list entries (queue position + any live grab offer). Response getData() is a List<WaitlistEntryDTO>.
      Parameters:
      visitorId - the owning visitor's national id
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • acceptGrab

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> acceptGrab(int reservationId)
      Accepts an active grab offer, confirming the WAITING reservation (the server re-validates the offer window and capacity). Response getData() is the now-CONFIRMED ReservationDTO.
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the offered WAITING reservation to claim
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • leaveWaitlist

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> leaveWaitlist(int reservationId)
      Leaves the waiting list for a WAITING reservation. If a grab offer is active this is a decline, and the server advances the freed slot to the next in line.
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the WAITING reservation to remove from the queue
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • getMyPark

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> getMyPark()
      Fetches the logged-in park manager's own park — no id is sent, so the server derives it from the session. Response getData() is a ParkDTO.
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • listParks

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> listParks()
      Lists every park, for the booking dropdown. Response getData() is a List<ParkDTO>.
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • requestParamChange

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> requestParamChange(ParamField field, int newValue)
      Submits a park-parameter change request (PARK_MANAGER only). Only the field and new value travel on the wire — the target park is derived server-side from the manager's own assignment, never trusted from the client. The change is stored PENDING and does not touch the park until a department manager approves it.
      Parameters:
      field - which park parameter to change
      newValue - the requested new value
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • listPendingChanges

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> listPendingChanges()
      Lists all PENDING parameter-change requests (DEPT_MANAGER only). Response getData() is a List<ParameterChangeRequestDTO>.
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • approveParamChange

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> approveParamChange(int requestId)
      Approves a pending change (DEPT_MANAGER only); on success the new value is written to the park. Fails if the request is no longer PENDING.
      Parameters:
      requestId - the change request to approve
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • rejectParamChange

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> rejectParamChange(int requestId)
      Rejects a pending change (DEPT_MANAGER only); the park is left unchanged. Fails if the request is no longer PENDING.
      Parameters:
      requestId - the change request to reject
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • enterVisit

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> enterVisit(int confirmationCode, long visitorId)
      Admits a visitor against a CONFIRMED reservation (PARK_EMPLOYEE only — the server re-checks the role and that the gate operates the employee's own park). The server validates the code, the matching visitor id, and the park. Response getData() is the opened VisitDTO.
      Parameters:
      confirmationCode - the booking confirmation code presented at the gate
      visitorId - the national id presented, which must match the reservation
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • exitVisit

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> exitVisit(Integer confirmationCode, Long visitorId)
      Records a visitor's exit, closing their open visit (PARK_EMPLOYEE only). The open visit is found by confirmation code when supplied, otherwise by visitor id; a reservation-backed visit also flips its reservation to COMPLETED. Pass exactly one of the two — the other as null.
      Parameters:
      confirmationCode - the booking confirmation code, or null to exit by visitor id
      visitorId - the visitor's national id, or null to exit by code
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • exitVisitByTicket

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> exitVisitByTicket(int visitId)
      Records a casual walk-in's exit by its ticket number (PARK_EMPLOYEE only). The ticket number is the visit id handed to the employee at admission — the only handle for exiting an anonymous casual party (it has no confirmation code or visitor id). The server closes the open visit at the employee's park.
      Parameters:
      visitId - the ticket number shown at casual admission
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • casualVisit

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> casualVisit(int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long visitorId)
      Records a casual walk-in at the employee's park (PARK_EMPLOYEE only). The server enforces the physical-capacity gate (rejecting with "park full" when it would exceed maxCapacity - gapSize) and prices the visit; the price is returned on the VisitDTO, never recomputed here.
      Parameters:
      partySize - the number of people walking in
      visitType - INDIVIDUAL, FAMILY, or GROUP
      visitorId - an optional national id (a subscriber earns the member discount), or null
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • currentOccupancy

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> currentOccupancy()
      Fetches live occupancy for the employee's own park (PARK_EMPLOYEE only — no park id is sent, so the server derives it from the session). Response getData() is an OccupancyDTO.
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • loginStaff

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> loginStaff(String username, String password)
      Authenticates a staff user. On success the response carries a UserDTO in getData(); on failure the message explains why ("Invalid username or password." / "already logged in elsewhere.").
      Parameters:
      username - the staff member's username
      password - the staff member's password
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • loginVisitor

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> loginVisitor(long visitorId)
      Authenticates a visitor by national ID. On success the response carries a VisitorDTO in getData().
      Parameters:
      visitorId - the visitor's national id
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • logout

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> logout()
      Logs the current actor out, releasing the server-side single-login lock.
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • listNotifications

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> listNotifications()
      Lists the logged-in actor's notifications, newest first (the offline-fetch path for the notification center). The server derives the recipient from the session, so no id is sent. Response getData() is a List<NotificationDTO>.
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • ackNotification

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> ackNotification(int notificationId)
      Acknowledges (marks read) a single notification, clearing its unread state.
      Parameters:
      notificationId - the notification to acknowledge
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • registerSubscriber

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> registerSubscriber(long visitorId, String fullName, String phone, String email, int familySize)
      Registers a subscriber (SERVICE_REP only — the server re-checks the role). The visitor is found-or-created from visitorId and the supplied details, then promoted to a subscriber. On success the response carries a VisitorDTO; on failure the message explains why (e.g. "already a subscriber" or "Only a service representative …").
      Parameters:
      visitorId - the subscriber's national id
      fullName - the subscriber's full name
      phone - the subscriber's phone number
      email - the subscriber's email address
      familySize - the subscriber's family size
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • registerGuide

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> registerGuide(long visitorId, String fullName, String phone, String email)
      Registers a visitor as a group guide (SERVICE_REP only — the server re-checks the role and stamps the guide row with the logged-in rep's id). The visitor is found-or-created from visitorId and the supplied details without changing their subscriber status.
      Parameters:
      visitorId - the guide's national id
      fullName - the guide's full name
      phone - the guide's phone number
      email - the guide's email address
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • visitsReport

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> visitsReport(String from, String to, Integer parkId)
      Runs the Visits-by-Type report (DEPT_MANAGER only — the server re-checks the role). Response getData() is a VisitsReportDTO.
      Parameters:
      from - inclusive range start, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      to - inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      parkId - a specific park id, or null for the whole region (all parks)
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • cancellationsReport

      public CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> cancellationsReport(String from, String to, Integer parkId)
      Runs the Cancellations report (DEPT_MANAGER only — the server re-checks the role). Response getData() is a CancellationsReportDTO.
      Parameters:
      from - inclusive range start, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      to - inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      parkId - a specific park id, or null for the whole region (all parks)
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response

    • reportRequest

      private CompletableFuture<ServerResponse> reportRequest(RequestType type, String from, String to, Integer parkId)
      Shared builder for the two report requests. A null park id travels as the "ALL" sentinel, which the server normalises (together with a missing/blank value) to "whole region".
      Parameters:
      type - the report request type
      from - inclusive range start, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      to - inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      parkId - a specific park id, or null for the whole region
      Returns:
      a future, completed on the JavaFX thread, with the server's response
